'''dhazhuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psalmography|psalmography]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psalmography|psalmography]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhazhuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzhihith|dhæzhihith]] || [[word:dhæzhihij|dhæzhihij]] || [[word:dhæzhihish|dhæzhihish]] || [[word:dhæzhihi|dhæzhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhuzhuhuth|dhazhuzhuhuth]] || [[word:dhazhuzhuhuj|dhazhuzhuhuj]] || [[word:dhazhuzhuhush|dhazhuzhuhush]] || [[word:dhazhuzhuhu|dhazhuzhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhuhuth|dhazhuhuth]] || [[word:dhazhuhuj|dhazhuhuj]] || [[word:dhazhuhush|dhazhuhush]] || [[word:dhazhuhu|dhazhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhufhuth|dhazhufhuth]] || [[word:dhazhufhuj|dhazhufhuj]] || [[word:dhazhufhush|dhazhufhush]] || [[word:dhazhufhuf|dhazhufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazhuhuthu|dhazhuhuthu]] || [[word:dhazhuhuju|dhazhuhuju]] || [[word:dhazhuhushu|dhazhuhushu]] || [[word:dhazhuhuku|dhazhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazhuhuth|dhazhuhuth]] || [[word:dhazhuhuj|dhazhuhuj]] || [[word:dhazhuhush|dhazhuhush]] || [[word:dhazhuhu|dhazhuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazhuhuthul|dhazhuhuthul]] || [[word:dhazhuhujul|dhazhuhujul]] || [[word:dhazhuhushul|dhazhuhushul]] || [[word:dhazhuhukul|dhazhuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazhuhuthuthu|dhazhuhuthuthu]] || [[word:dhazhuhujuju|dhazhuhujuju]] || [[word:dhazhuhushushu|dhazhuhushushu]] || [[word:dhazhuhuku|dhazhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazhuhuthun|dhazhuhuthun]] || [[word:dhazhuhujun|dhazhuhujun]] || [[word:dhazhuhushun|dhazhuhushun]] || [[word:dhazhuhukun|dhazhuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazhuhuthuoro|dhazhuhuthuoro]] || [[word:dhazhuhujuoro|dhazhuhujuoro]] || [[word:dhazhuhushuoro|dhazhuhushuoro]] || [[word:dhazhuhukuoro|dhazhuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
